title: Aureline pending-review-inbox row vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the pending-review-inbox row record family frozen in docs/vcs/hosted_review_and_merge_policy_contract.md. One review_inbox_row_record pins which review surface is rendering one inbox row, which review_workspace_record the row points at, why the row is in the actor's inbox (the closed seven-value review_inbox_row_class vocabulary: authored_by_current_actor, review_requested_from_current_actor, following_for_visibility_only, mentioned_in_thread, assigned_for_landing, draft_only_local_not_yet_published, imported_bundle_inbox_row), the row's authority chip (the closed five-value review_inbox_state_class vocabulary: provider_authoritative, local_parity_estimate, stale_relative_to_base_or_head, not_evaluated_on_this_surface, draft_only_no_provider_state), the inbox-level freshness chip (the closed four-value inbox_freshness_sync_class vocabulary), and the offline-continuation posture (the closed five-value offline_continuation_class vocabulary). The record reserves linked refs into the review-workspace, review-pack, review-evaluation-result, work-item, merge-queue-entry, and merge-policy contracts; raw bodies, raw URLs, and raw branch / commit identity strings never appear on this record. The eventual hosted-review-inbox crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, inbox-row class, inbox-state class, freshness-sync class, offline-continuation class, lifecycle state, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps review_inbox_row_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

review_inbox_row_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the review-inbox-row vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests / portability exports. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw comment bodies, raw provider rule bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload.

freshness_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (ADR-0011). The row-level chip; per-row inbox freshness lives in inbox_freshness_sync_class.

policy_context.description: Policy context the inbox row was minted under.

review_inbox_row_class.description: Frozen review-inbox-row class vocabulary. authored_by_current_actor = the actor authored the underlying workspace; review_requested_from_current_actor = a review was requested from the actor; following_for_visibility_only = the actor is following the workspace for visibility but no action is required; mentioned_in_thread = the actor was @-mentioned in a comment thread on the workspace; assigned_for_landing = the actor is assigned to land the workspace; draft_only_local_not_yet_published = the actor opened the workspace locally and it has not been published to a provider; imported_bundle_inbox_row = the row was hydrated from an imported review bundle (no provider authority).

review_inbox_state_class.description: Frozen review-inbox-state vocabulary. provider_authoritative = the headline cues are owned by the provider and the surface MUST cite a fresh inbox_freshness_sync_class to keep the chip honest; local_parity_estimate = computed locally from a fresh provider snapshot, surface MUST surface the typed 'estimated locally' disclosure; stale_relative_to_base_or_head = the row's headline cues are pinned to a base or head identity that has drifted and the chip MUST NOT be relabelled as authoritative; not_evaluated_on_this_surface = the row exists for triage / link purposes only; draft_only_no_provider_state = the row is a local draft and the provider has no overlay for the underlying workspace.

inbox_freshness_sync_class.description: Frozen inbox-row freshness vocabulary. _fresh = the inbox row is within its grace window; _stale_within_grace = past ideal freshness but inside grace, the chip surfaces 'stale' without blocking; _stale_beyond_grace_local_continues = past grace, provider-authoritative cues are no longer rendered as authoritative and local review continues; _unverifiable_provider_unreachable = the provider was unreachable on the last attempt and the inbox row continues with the last-known cached label marked degraded.

offline_continuation_class.description: Frozen offline-continuation vocabulary. online_synced_no_offline_state = the actor is online and no offline draft exists; offline_capture_pending_publish_later = the actor authored a comment / approval / dismissal locally that has not been published yet; offline_export_only_no_publish_later = the row supports export only and no publish-later action is admissible; provider_outage_local_continues_publish_blocked = the provider is unreachable and publish-later actions are forbidden under this row's policy / trust posture; provider_outage_local_continues_publish_queued = the provider is unreachable but publish-later actions are admissible and have been queued for the next sync.

review_inbox_row_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the review_inbox_row audit stream.

review_inbox_row_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the review_inbox_row stream. review_inbox_row_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a review_inbox_row_denial_reason.

review_workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the review_workspace_record (schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json) the inbox row points at.

linked_work_item_ref.description: Optional opaque ref into schemas/work_items/work_item_detail.schema.json. The inbox row never duplicates the work-item body.

linked_review_evaluation_result_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref into schemas/vcs/review_evaluation_result.schema.json. When the inbox row's headline cue is a checks-strip summary, this ref pins the result the cue summarised; the strip rows themselves live on the review_workspace_state_record.

merge_queue_entry_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref into schemas/vcs/merge_queue_entry.schema.json when the inbox row's underlying workspace has an active queue entry.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when review_inbox_lifecycle_state is archived_tombstone. Null otherwise.

merge_policy_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the merge-policy resolver. Currently always null; once the merge-policy contract lands, this slot may carry the resolved merge-policy row id.

allOf.description: When inbox_freshness_sync_class is inbox_row_unverifiable_provider_unreachable, the inbox row MUST resolve review_inbox_state_class to local_parity_estimate, not_evaluated_on_this_surface, or draft_only_no_provider_state so cached overlay cues are not relabelled as authoritative.
draft_only_local_not_yet_published rows MUST resolve review_inbox_state_class to draft_only_no_provider_state.
imported_bundle_inbox_row rows MUST resolve review_inbox_state_class to not_evaluated_on_this_surface or local_parity_estimate; an imported bundle is never provider_authoritative on this surface.
archived_at is required (non-null) when review_inbox_lifecycle_state is archived_tombstone and MUST be null otherwise.

review_inbox_row_record.description: Row shape consumed by pending-review inbox surfaces, hosted-review readers, AI review-aware overlays, and support / export. Exactly one row per actor-visible inbox identity per workspace; the same workspace MAY appear in more than one row class for the same actor.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when review_inbox_row_audit_event_id_value is review_inbox_row_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is review_inbox_row_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

review_inbox_row_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the review_inbox_row stream.
